{{Quote|We're going to have to pack up most of our offices and rely on long-term droid observations now.|Tobbert Dalonbian, to HoloNet News|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Tobbert Dalonbian''' was president of the [[Extragalactic Society]], an institute searching for [[Extragalactic/Legends|extragalactic]] [[Species/Legends|life]],<ref name="HNN" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="CWdate">[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47]] is dated to "13:3:14," which is a [[Great ReSynchronization]] date corresponding to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], per the reasoning [[:Template:YearMathGRS|here]].</ref> When [[Scientist/Legends|scientific]] [[Currency/Legends|funding]] was restricted by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Galactic Republic General Ministry|General Ministry]] across all of its [[General Ministry Institutes|institutes]] in that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], a clearly disconsolate Dalonbian reported that the Society would have to close most of its offices and rely on [[Droid/Legends|droid]]-based methods of operation. Dalonbian shared a last name with the<ref name="HNN" /> [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Tobbert Dalonbian was introduced in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #47'']], an installment of the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] website<ref name="HNN" /> released on [[March 14]], [[2002]].<ref name="JCF">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6043781|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=JadedofMara|date=2002-03-14|time=7:37 PM|archiveurl=https://archive.is/ubf5g}}</ref>
